source.note: nanostate did not have a states of matter example.  I made this, following this unrelated machine as a style guide.  nanostate does not appear to support on-action hooks, and does not appear to pass the previous state when calling its global enter hook.  Therefore there is no way to correctly implement the hooks leading to liquid - condense and melt - because you can't tell whether they're coming from solid or gas.  On these grounds, nanostate cannot implement this machine correctly.
